summary: Completed comprehensive testing of enhanced Post-Eval admin tab with consulting-grade reporting, PDF export, and CSV export. All 16 backend tests passed (2 skipped for 404 cases requiring empty DB). All frontend features verified: Programme Grade card (A, 82.9/100), export buttons, NPS/Readiness charts, session ratings, facilitator cards, tool ratings, agents built, deployment matrix, goals achieved, capability shift, commitments, feedback highlights. Existing pre-training tabs (Overview, Full Report, Analysis, Submissions) and landing page still work correctly.

issues: Console warnings about chart dimensions (-1 width/height) - cosmetic issue from Recharts, charts still render correctly. Known issue from previous iterations.

context_for_next_testing_agent: Enhanced Post-Eval tab fully tested. New features working: Programme Grade card (A/B/C/D based on composite score), Consulting PDF Report button, Export CSV button, programme_effectiveness with grade/programme_score, commitment_summary with commitment_rate, feedback_highlights with most_valuable array, agents_built_summary, capability_shift_summary. All existing tabs (Overview, Full Report, Analysis, Submissions) still work. Landing page and /post-evaluation form still work. Note: Pre-training submissions count is 0, so pre-training PDF/CSV exports return 404 (expected).

GET /api/admin/post-eval-stats.programme_effectiveness: PASS - Returns grade (A), programme_score (82.9), overall_session_avg, avg_goal_achievement, nps_classification
GET /api/admin/post-eval-stats.feedback_highlights: PASS - Returns most_valuable, deeper_topics, team_messages, final_words arrays
GET /api/admin/post-eval-stats.agents_built_summary: PASS - Returns agents_built array with name/count/percentage, prompt_status array
GET /api/admin/post-eval-stats.capability_shift_summary: PASS - Returns challenges_addressed array, before_after_reflections array

backend_api.GET /api/admin/post-eval-report/pdf: PASS - Returns 200, application/pdf, valid PDF magic bytes, 11KB file
backend_api.GET /api/admin/post-eval-export: PASS - Returns 200, text/csv, 60 columns including tool ratings, session ratings, facilitator dimensions
